SAP Future of PMM Training
Chapter 5 Learning Guide
futureofpmm.com

Winning the Technical Deep Dive

Key concepts and takeaways from Chapter 5

Learning Objectives

  • Understand how technical buyers use AI agents to evaluate
  • Structure documentation for agent-assisted research
  • Prepare demos that answer AI-generated questions
  • Create POC materials that close capability gaps

The AI-Assisted Champion

Technical buyers now use AI to accelerate evaluation from weeks to days:

  • Requirements mapping — Systematic checks against documentation
  • Deep technical queries — Specific architectural questions
  • Comparison analysis — Cross-vendor feature matrices
  • Proposal building — AI-drafted business cases
Key Insight: Your champion's AI assistant is your first technical evaluator. If it can't find answers, you're creating deal friction.

Three Principles of Agent-Ready Documentation

PrincipleWhat It MeansHow to Implement
StructuredClear hierarchies, consistent formattingExplicit headers, logical organization
QueryableEvery claim answerable with direct excerpt"Does X support Y?" has explicit answer
ComprehensiveNo capability gapsDocument everything; gaps = missing

Documentation Checklist

  • Integration matrix with yes/no capability markers
  • Architecture diagrams with text descriptions
  • Complete API reference with examples
  • Security documentation (compliance, encryption, access)
  • Quantified performance benchmarks
  • Clear deployment options (cloud/on-prem/hybrid)

The Demo Shift

Before AIAfter AI
Demo = DiscoveryDemo = Validation
"Let me show you features""Let me address AI's questions"
General capability overviewSpecific gap verification

What AI Asks About Your Product

  • Edge cases and unusual scenarios
  • Scalability limits and failure modes
  • Integration specifics
  • Security in practice

Capability Gap Framework

CategoryDefinitionAction
VerifiedAI found explicit documentationMaintain
ProbableAI inferred from related docsMake explicit
UncertainNo clear evidenceDocument immediately
GapEvidence of limitationReframe with alternatives

POC Content Assets

  • Capability validation guides — Step-by-step verification instructions
  • Reference architectures — Pre-built best-practice designs
  • Test scripts — Documented scenarios with expected outcomes
  • Success criteria templates — Pre-defined metrics favoring your strengths

Key Takeaways

  1. Technical evaluation compressed from weeks to days
  2. Documentation must be structured, queryable, comprehensive
  3. Demos shifted from discovery to validation
  4. POC content closes AI-identified capability gaps
  5. Every unanswered AI question = documentation improvement opportunity
